coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass grants 50% off for up to 4 people using ferry transportation to the Boston Harbor Islands (Georges, Peddocks, or Spectacle Island). Discount code will be emailed when library pass is reserved. Currently there is no coupon to pick up for Boston Harbor Islands. You must reserve your library pass and then purchase your ferry tickets online using the code sent to you. Visit http://www.bostonharborislands.org/ to learn about the Islands, view park maps and activity calendars, and access the ferry schedule.
